name: Ima -Even if the world ends tomorrow- (Japanese Ver.)

lines.lyric: Tatta hitotsu wo mamoritai nda
lines.lyric_hangul: たったひとつを守りたいんだ
lines.lyric_translation: There’s just one thing I want to hold onto

lines.lyric: Sukoshi agatta kuchibiru sono egao wo
lines.lyric_hangul: 少し上がった唇 その笑顔を
lines.lyric_translation: That hint of a smile that plays on your lips

lines.lyric: Heibon na hibi atsumete otona he to
lines.lyric_hangul: 平凡な日々集め 大人へと
lines.lyric_translation: We live out our ordinary days and grow up

lines.lyric: Taihendakedo koukai wa nai
lines.lyric_hangul: 大変だけど後悔はない
lines.lyric_translation: It’s not easy but I have no regrets

lines.lyric: Kyou wo hete asu ni meguriau yorokobi
lines.lyric_hangul: 今日を経て明日に巡り会う喜び
lines.lyric_translation: The joy of tomorrow’s encounters after today’s journey

lines.lyric: Kono omoi zenbu ga utsukushii
lines.lyric_hangul: この想い全部が美しい
lines.lyric_translation: This whole feeling is so lovely

lines.lyric: “moshimo sekai saigo no yoru ga kitara”
lines.lyric_hangul: 「もしも世界最後の夜が来たら」
lines.lyric_translation: If the last night of the world were to come

lines.lyric: “boku wa kimi no tame ni nani ga dekiru?”
lines.lyric_hangul: 「僕は君のために何ができる？」
lines.lyric_translation: What would I be able to do for you?

lines.lyric: Kimi ni Last Dance
lines.lyric_hangul: 君に last dance
lines.lyric_translation: To you, the last dance

lines.lyric: Mabushisugiru sono egao wo
lines.lyric_hangul: まぶしすぎるその笑顔を
lines.lyric_translation: That absolutely blinding smile

lines.lyric: Mamoreru nara moshi dekiru nara
lines.lyric_hangul: 守れるなら もしできるなら
lines.lyric_translation: If I could hold onto that, if I could just do that

lines.lyric: Bokura Last Dance and Last Chance
lines.lyric_hangul: 僕ら last dance and last chance
lines.lyric_translation: Our last dance and last chance

lines.lyric: Konya sekai ga owattemo
lines.lyric_hangul: 今夜 世界が終わっても
lines.lyric_translation: Even if the whole world ended tonight

lines.lyric: Daiji ni shitai no wa bokura no ‘ima’
lines.lyric_hangul: 大事にしたいのは 僕らの「今」
lines.lyric_translation: I just want to cherish what it is we have now
